'''Vagran''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] with different [[Temperature/Legends|temperate]] zones all varying in temperature and precipitation. Its climates and its favorable [[Star/Legends|sunlight]] enabled Vagran to support a great deal of life.

During the [[Thrawn campaign]], [[Talon Karrde]]'s team obtained three [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat]]s from Vagran.

{{Planet-stub}}
